question: Will the S&P 500 be above 6924.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 closed at 6783 on April 8, requiring a 2.1% gain in one day to reach 6925. While markets rallied on the Iran ceasefire, the technical situation remains weak with the index below key moving averages. The ceasefire is only temporary (two weeks) and markets remain sensitive to geopolitical developments. A 2%+ single-day move is possible but unlikely given current market conditions and overhead resistance.
